mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medir_roster_week (team_id, week_start_date, year_label, status, version, remark) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{weekStartDate}, #{yearLabel}, #{status}, #{version}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE medir_roster_week SET year_label = #{yearLabel}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medir_roster_week WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND week_start_date = #{weekStartDate}
SELECT * FROM medir_roster_week WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND year_label = #{yearLabel} ORDER BY week_start_date
